title: Premium
descriptionPremium: You have access to everything LiveStreamRecorder has to offer
descriptionNonPremium: Get instant access to everything LiveStreamRecorder has to offer
currentPlanRecord: Record up to 3 of your own channels
premiumRecord100: Record up to 100 of your own channels
stripeDescription: Credit Card, Google Pay, Apple Pay and more
adminAccess: You have full premium access as an admin/champion.
cancelledMessage: Your {billingPeriod} subscription has been cancelled. You still have access until {endDate}.
activeMessage: You are on the {billingPeriod} plan. Next billing date: {renewDate}.
lifetimeMessage: You have lifetime access to all premium features. Thank you for your support!
supportMessage: LiveStreamRecorder is a one-person project. Your support helps keep the servers running and new features coming. Thank you!
futureFeatures: Premium includes all future features as they're released.
vatNotice: * The applicable Value Added Tax (VAT) will be calculated and added to your total during the final payment process.
cancelModalMessage: We're sorry to see you go! If you cancel, you'll still have access to premium features until {endDate}.
cancelModalAfter: After that, your account will return to the free plan.
